Heineken × Kairo

Most beers are
sold.
Few are lived.

We connect the physical product with the digital pulse of the consumer. One ritual. One identity. One experience.

⬡

NFC · No Download · Instant Activation

Explore the vision
The Ecosystem

Four pillars.
One complete ritual.

Every bottle activates a unique, contextual, unrepeatable experience.

01
◈
Digital Ownership
Every ritual is a unique coordinate on the global map. Your consumption becomes a digital asset.
02
⬡
Perfect Pour
Camera + real-time visual AI. The two-finger foam of the Heineken standard, every time.
03
◎
AI Contextual
Weather, location and moment curate the perfect variant and the ideal 30-minute playlist.
04
◉
Hyper-Local
Visualize the pulse of active rituals in your city, in real time.
The Experience Flow

From the bottle
to the complete ritual.

01
Touch
NFC Activation
The chip on the bottle opens the experience with zero downloads. Zero friction.
Zero friction
02
Pour
Perfect Pour
The camera detects foam level in real time. Visual AI signals the exact moment to stop.
WebRTC · Frame Analysis
03
Experience
Real Context + AI
Geo, weather and moment auto-detected. Just two questions. AI recommends your ideal Heineken.
Claude AI · Open-Meteo
04
Reward
Your Heineken + Your Prize
Story Card for Stories, 30-min Spotify playlist. Complete 3 rituals and unlock a tangible reward: The Sub home draught machine or a 5L Heineken keg — delivered by the brand.
First-party data · Retention · Reward
Live Demo

This is not a concept.
It's running right now.

Real geolocation, live weather, generative AI, active camera. One single HTML file.
